text:

Log:
  - Stage
  - Pet portlint

Modified:

  head/databases/pydbx/pkg-descr

Modified: head/databases/pydbx/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pydbx/Makefile	Tue Apr 15 15:56:51 2014	(r351345)
+++ head/databases/pydbx/Makefile	Tue Apr 15 15:58:00 2014	(r351346)
@@ -14,5 +14,4 @@ COMMENT=	Simple SQL database abstraction
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/databases/pydbx/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/pydbx/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 15 15:56:51 2014	(r351345)
+++ head/databases/pydbx/pkg-descr	Tue Apr 15 15:58:00 2014	(r351346)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@ of dbx is to make using a SQL database a
 providing a consistent API across different databases.
 
 Author:	David Phillips <david@acz.org>
-WWW:	http://david.acz.org/pydbx/
+WWW: http://david.acz.org/pydbx/
